payload.answer: The Brain Slack agent has transitioned from planned (status=open) to MVP implemented. The prior planned state is now superseded and should not be presented as current.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New input: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented
payload.decision: This is a temporal status transition conflict. The new information supersedes the existing planned/open state. The prior state (planned, status=open) should be retired and replaced with the current state (MVP implemented). No ambiguity exists — the new fact is a direct progression of the same entity.

entity_resolution.reason: The Brain Slack agent MVP is the same entity as the planned Brain Slack agent. The new statement reflects a status change from planned/open to implemented, not a new or separate entity.

payload.intent: Update the status of the Brain Slack agent from planned/open to implemented (MVP complete)

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

details: Existing planned/open state marked as superseded.
New memory card created reflecting MVP implemented status.
Entity resolved to existing entity 'brain_slack_agent' — no new entity created.

repair_options: Retire the existing memory card with status=open and replace it with status=MVP implemented.
Tag the old card with a 'superseded_at' timestamp and link it to the new card for audit trail purposes.
